case_title: GARCIA, IGNACIO REYES vs. CEN-CAL WALLBOARD et al

docket_entries.description: OSC CALENDAR OF NOV-22-1995, DISMISSAL PURSUANT TO SECTIONS 581(B)(4) AND 583.150 OF THE CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE AND CALIFONIA INDEMNITY CO. -VS- SUPERIOR COURT, (1995) 36 CAL.APP. 4TH 678.

OSC CALENDAR OF OCT-25-1995, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $100.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON OCT-25-1995, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), 2ND OSC FOR PLAINTIFF. CASE WILL BE DISMISSED IF NO GOOD CAUSE IS SHOWN FOR NOT APPEARING ON 10/25/95., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE NOV-17-1995 CONTINUED FROM OCT-25-1995 TO NOV-22-1995 AT 02:00 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF SEP-25-1995, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON SEP-25-1995, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4) HEARING SET FOR OCT-25-1995 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF GARCIA, IGNACIO REYES AS TO DEFENDANT CEN-CAL WALLBOARD DOES 1 TO 25 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          SEP-25-1995 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUL-25-1995 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       SEP-05-1995
